response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — his recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of deep JVM or IDE subsystem development.
strengths: Demonstrated deep systems programming experience with JVM-related languages (Java) in past roles
Strong track record in developer tooling, CI/CD, and open-source contributions
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and public talks on technical topics
concerns: Recent roles show minimal focus on Java/Kotlin or enterprise frameworks like Spring
No clear evidence of IDE internals, language server protocol, or JVM tooling work in last 5 years
Primary tech stack is now TypeScript/Node.js, raising questions about JVM domain retention
